publishedAbstract: - Openshift Data Foundation upgrade is in Pending state.- The CSV's "mcg-operator" and "odf-csi-addons-operator" are in Pending state. ~~~ mcg-operator.v4.14.6-rhodf NooBaa Operator 4.14.6-rhodf mcg-operator.v4.14.5-rhodf Failed mcg-operator.v4.15.0-rhodf NooBaa Operator 4.15.0-rhodf mcg-operator.v4.14.6-rhodf Pending odf-csi-addons-operator.v4.14.6-rhodf CSI Addons 4.14.6-rhodf odf-csi-addons-operator.v4.14.5-rhodf Pending odf-csi-addons-operator.v4.15.0-rhodf CSI Addons 4.15.0-rhodf odf-csi-addons-operator.v4.14.6-rhodf Pending ~~~- The OLM is reporting error for failing/pending CSV's" `OLM install strategy failed: rolebindings.rbac.authorization.k8s.io "" already exists` `'NeedsReinstall' webhooks not installed`- The `noobaa-db-pg-0` pod is in CLBO state.
publishedTitle: ODF upgrade to 4.15 is in Pending state, why?
